requestment_date.text: วันที่ขอกู้

root.sql: select sc_lon_m_ucf_req_salnet_type.item_code , sc_lon_m_ucf_req_salnet_type.item_code_desc , count(sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no) as count_requestment_no , sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type||' - '||( select sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description from sc_lon_m_rule where sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type ) as loan_type_description , sum(sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_request_amount) as loan_request_amount from sc_lon_m_loan_request , sc_lon_m_req_salnet_exp ,sc_lon_m_ucf_req_salnet_type where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_req_salnet_exp.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_salnet_exp.item_code = sc_lon_m_ucf_req_salnet_type.item_code and sc_lon_m_req_salnet_exp.item_code in ('01','02','03','04','05','06') /*WHERE*/ --and sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date between '01/05/2021' and '31/05/2021' group by sc_lon_m_ucf_req_salnet_type.item_code , sc_lon_m_ucf_req_salnet_type.item_code_desc ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type order by sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type , sc_lon_m_ucf_req_salnet_type.item_code
